name.fr: Coco bread (pain à la noix de coco jamaïcain)

description.en: A soft, faintly sweet Jamaican roll enriched with coconut milk and butter, rolled thin, folded into a half-moon, and baked until tender. Split it open while warm for its most famous job: the pocket for a Jamaican beef patty.
description.de: Ein weiches, leicht süßes jamaikanisches Brötchen, mit Kokosmilch und Butter angereichert, dünn ausgerollt, zu einem Halbmond gefaltet und weich gebacken. Warm aufgeklappt übernimmt es seine berühmteste Aufgabe: die Tasche für eine jamaikanische Beef Patty.
description.es: Un panecillo jamaicano suave y algo dulce, enriquecido con leche de coco y mantequilla, estirado fino, doblado en media luna y horneado hasta quedar tierno. Se abre caliente para cumplir su función más famosa: el bolsillo de una empanada jamaicana de carne.
description.fr: Un petit pain jamaïcain moelleux et légèrement sucré, enrichi de lait de coco et de beurre, étalé fin, plié en demi-lune et cuit jusqu'à devenir tendre. On l'ouvre chaud pour son rôle le plus célèbre : la poche d'un chausson à la viande jamaïcain (patty).

origin.note: Likely developed during the colonial plantation era by enslaved African and indentured Chinese and Indian laborers; today it's the classic wrapper for a Jamaican beef patty.

ingredients.note: melted, divided between the dough and brushing

keeping.note: Best fresh and still warm, split open for a patty; freezes and reheats well for a couple of months.

method.title: Mix
method.summary: Combine most of the flour with sugar, salt and yeast, then stir in warm coconut milk and melted butter to a soft, sticky dough.

method.title: Knead
method.summary: Knead in the remaining flour on a floured surface until smooth, about 10 minutes.

method.title: First rise
method.summary: Cover and let double in size, 60-90 minutes.

method.title: Roll and butter
method.summary: Roll the dough thin, cut into squares, and brush each with melted butter.

method.title: Fold
method.summary: Fold each square over on itself and trim into a half-moon shape.

method.title: Rest and bake
method.summary: Brush the tops with more butter, let rest 10 minutes, then bake until golden.

source.adaptation: Coconut milk's water and fat split estimated from typical canned coconut milk, since it isn't among the taxonomy's defined conversions.
